title: Termination of Part
doc_html:
§109. Termination of Part

            This Part shall become null and of no effect on January 12, 2023.

            Acts 2009, No. 491, §1, eff. July 10, 2009; Acts 2020, 1st Ex. Sess., No. 24, §1, eff. July 13, 2020.
doc_text:
§109.  Termination of Part
This Part shall become null and of no effect on January 12, 2023.
Acts 2009, No. 491, §1, eff. July 10, 2009; Acts 2020, 1
st
Ex. Sess., No. 24, §1, eff.
July 13, 2020.
